tasks.label: DAPLink: pyocd flash
tasks.command: bash -lc 'serial=$(jq -r .probe.serial daplink_flash.json); file=$(jq -r .flash.file daplink_flash.json); target=$(jq -r .flash.pyocd_target daplink_flash.json); freq=$(jq -r .flash.pyocd_frequency daplink_flash.json); python3 -m pyocd flash -u "$serial" -t "$target" -f "$freq" -e auto "$file"'

tasks.label: DAPLink: STM32CubeProgrammer flash
tasks.command: bash -lc 'serial=$(jq -r .probe.serial daplink_flash.json); file=$(jq -r .flash.file daplink_flash.json); /opt/st/stm32cubeclt_1.21.0/STM32CubeProgrammer/bin/STM32_Programmer_CLI -c port=SWD sn="$serial" -w "$file" -v'

tasks.label: DAPLink: OpenOCD flash
tasks.command: bash -lc 'serial=$(jq -r .probe.serial daplink_flash.json); file=$(jq -r .flash.file daplink_flash.json); openocd -f interface/cmsis-dap.cfg -c "adapter serial $serial" -f target/stm32f4x.cfg -c "adapter_khz 1000; transport select swd; init; reset init; program $file verify reset exit"'

tasks.label: DAPLink: Remote USBIP Attach for Debug
tasks.command: bash -lc 'set -e; cfg=daplink_flash.json; server=$(jq -r .probe.ip $cfg); busid=$(jq -r .probe.busid $cfg); serial=$(jq -r .probe.serial $cfg); freq=$(jq -r .flash.pyocd_frequency $cfg); file=$(jq -r .flash.file $cfg); if [ -z "$server" ] || [ "$server" = "REPLACE_WITH_DEVICE_IP" ]; then echo Config daplink_flash.json with probe.ip; exit 1; fi; echo Attaching $busid from $server...; sudo modprobe vhci-hcd; sudo usbip attach -r "$server" -b "$busid"; echo Waiting for device node...; for i in {1..20}; do if ls /dev/ttyACM* 1>/dev/null 2>&1 || ls /dev/hidraw* 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then echo Device node ready; break; fi; sleep 0.5; done; echo Starting pyOCD gdbserver...; python3 -m pyocd gdbserver -u "$serial" -f "$freq"'

tasks.label: DAPLink: Remote USBIP Detach
tasks.command: bash -lc 'set -e; cfg=daplink_flash.json; busid=$(jq -r .probe.busid $cfg); echo Detaching any usbip ports for busid $busid; port=$(usbip port | awk '/Exported/ {print $1}'); sudo usbip detach -p $port || true; sudo usbip unbind -b "$busid" || true; echo done'

tasks.label: DAPLink: Remote USBIP One-Click Flash
tasks.command: bash -lc 'set -e; cfg=daplink_flash.json; file=$(jq -r .flash.file $cfg); server=$(jq -r .probe.ip $cfg); busid=$(jq -r .probe.busid $cfg); serial=$(jq -r .probe.serial $cfg); freq=$(jq -r .flash.pyocd_frequency $cfg); if [ -z "$server" ] || [ "$server" = "REPLACE_WITH_DEVICE_IP" ]; then echo Config daplink_flash.json with probe.ip; exit 1; fi; echo Attaching $busid from $server...; sudo modprobe vhci-hcd; sudo usbip attach -r "$server" -b "$busid"; echo Waiting for device node...; for i in {1..20}; do if ls /dev/ttyACM* 1>/dev/null 2>&1 || ls /dev/hidraw* 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then break; fi; sleep 0.5; done; echo Starting pyOCD flash...; python3 -m pyocd flash -u "$serial" -f "$freq" -e auto "$file"; echo Flash finished; echo Detaching usbip...; port=$(usbip port | awk '/Attached/ {print $1; exit}'); if [ -n "$port" ]; then sudo usbip detach -p $port || true; fi; echo Done.'

label: DAPLink: Remote USBIP One-Click Flash
command: bash -lc 'set -e; cfg=daplink_flash.json; file=$(jq -r .flash.file $cfg); server=$(jq -r .probe.ip $cfg); busid=$(jq -r .probe.busid $cfg); serial=$(jq -r .probe.serial $cfg); freq=$(jq -r .flash.pyocd_frequency $cfg); if [ -z "$server" ] || [ "$server" = "REPLACE_WITH_DEVICE_IP" ]; then echo Config daplink_flash.json with probe.ip; exit 1; fi; echo Attaching $busid from $server...; sudo modprobe vhci-hcd; sudo usbip attach -r "$server" -b "$busid"; echo Waiting for device node...; for i in {1..20}; do if ls /dev/ttyACM* 1>/dev/null 2>&1 || ls /dev/hidraw* 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then break; fi; sleep 0.5; done; echo Starting pyOCD flash...; python3 -m pyocd flash -u "$serial" -f "$freq" -e auto "$file"; echo Flash finished; echo Detaching usbip...; port=$(usbip port | awk '/Attached/ {print $1; exit}'); if [ -n "$port" ]; then sudo usbip detach -p $port || true; fi; echo Done.'
